sources.title: AI-Powered Design Tools Market Report 2026
sources.claim: Market valued at USD 8.22B in 2026, projected to reach USD 18.16B by 2030 at 21.9% CAGR

sources.title: Figma Launches Native AI Design Agent as Revenue Surges 46% Amid Intensifying Competition
sources.claim: Figma Q1 2026 revenue $333.4M (+46% YoY); AI Design Agent launched May 21, 2026

sources.title: Figma Partners With OpenAI And Anthropic To Launch In-house AI Agent
sources.claim: Figma AI Design Agent uses Anthropic Claude and OpenAI integrations; natural language design editing; MCP integration

sources.title: Figma adds an AI assistant to its collaborative canvas
sources.claim: Figma AI agent rolls out in limited beta starting May 20, 2026; enables chat-driven edits and design system awareness

sources.title: Adobe Firefly Hits 22B Assets, 29% Market Share
sources.claim: Adobe Firefly: 22B+ assets generated by April 2025; 29% AI design market share; Midjourney 19%; Canva 16%; DALL-E 14%

sources.title: Canva — CNBC Disruptor 50 (2026)
sources.claim: Canva ranked on CNBC Disruptor 50 list May 2026 with $4B ARR and 265M monthly active users

sources.title: Figma launches an agentic tool specifically for design tasks
sources.claim: Figma AI Agent enables natural language editing and simultaneous multi-agent workflows

sources.title: AI-Powered Design Tools Global Market Report
sources.claim: AI design tools market was $7.22B in 2025; basis for 1Y growth calculation: $7.22B (2025) to $8.22B (2026) = +14%

sources.title: Adobe Photoshop Statistics 2026
sources.claim: Adobe Firefly: ~$400M direct revenue 2024-25; 11% of new Creative Cloud ARR; 61% from enterprise; 72% Fortune 500 design team adoption; 63% marketing agencies

sources.title: AI-Powered Design Tools Market — CAGR 19.6%
sources.claim: CAGR 19.6% through 2034; market size estimates used to extrapolate 5Y growth (+502% 2021-2026, approximate)

sources.title: Figma New Features May 2026
sources.claim: Figma AI Agent features: MCP integration, branch and PR workflow, multi-agent simultaneous tasks, design system awareness

sources.title: Canva Magic Write vs Adobe Firefly vs Figma AI — Marketing Leaders Guide 2026
sources.claim: 85% of marketers and creatives save 4+ hours per week with AI design tools; 73% of brand social teams generate at least one AI image per day

sources.note: The following claims were not directly verified with source URLs and should be treated as [unverified] or require additional sourcing before publication: (1) Stable Diffusion v1.0 hit 1M Discord users simultaneously with Midjourney in Aug 2022 — Midjourney's user count milestone is [unverified exact date]; (2) Canva acquired 'Krea AI' — the Krea acquisition is [unverified]; Canva-Leonardo.AI acquisition was confirmed via third-party reports but exact price/date needs primary source; (3) 'Canva passes 150M users driven by AI features Sept 2023' — the attribution to AI features is [estimated]; (4) The Figma 1Y growth rate of +46% applies to Q1 YoY revenue, not full-year market growth — the 14% figure is the market-level growth estimate which differs from Figma's company-specific growth rate.
